diagrams.title: Population to Sample Flow in Statistical Inference
diagrams.description: Shows how a population is sampled and how statistics are used to infer population parameters
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete process of statistical inference from population to conclusions

diagrams.title: Types of Statistical Inference
diagrams.description: Shows the two main branches and their subcategories
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the structure and components of statistical inference methods

diagrams.title: Parameter vs Statistic Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing relationship between population and sample measures
diagrams.purpose: Remembering that statistics describe samples while parameters describe populations
